code: import React from'react';import{Helmet}from'react-helmet';import MenuCategories from'../components/MenuCategories';import menu from'../data/menu';import{useTranslation}from'react-i18next';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Menu=()=>{const{language}=useTranslation();return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Helmet,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("title",{children:language==='ar'?'القائمة - إمباستو':'Menu - Impasto'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("meta",{name:"description",content:language==='ar'?'قائمة الطعام لدينا':'Our food menu'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("html",{lang:language,dir:language==='ar'?'rtl':'ltr'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"menu-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"menu-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:language==='ar'?'قائمتنا':'Our Menu'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:language==='ar'?'استمتع بأشهى المأكولات الإيطالية':'Experience the finest Italian cuisine'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MenuCategories,{menu:menu})]})]});};export default Menu;
